consistency.name: Consistent with expected naming conventions for class features.
consistency.class_level_mapping: Standard ASI progression for most classes in D&D 5e (levels 4, 8, 12, 16, 19).

quality.description: Accurate and complete description of the standard Ability Score Improvement (ASI) mechanic for a 5th Edition class.
quality.completeness: The data accurately reflects the rules text for this specific class feature.

options: Increase two different ability scores by 1 (max 20)
mechanics.class_specific: This is the standard, non-subclass ASI progression shared by Clerics and most other full casters/martial classes.

llm_audit.recommendations: No changes recommended. Data is high quality and mechanically accurate.
